privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating synthetic project portfolio entries. The target customer name is strictly 'Nebula Stream' with the description 'Enterprise streaming solutions provider'. The target project is 'Legacy System Migration' with the description 'Migrating COBOL mainframes to cloud infrastructure'. The admin user to be assigned exists in the database with the exact name 'Admin User', confirmed via environment setup scripts. The two required activities are exactly 'Code Analysis' and 'Data Transfer'. All these parameters are explicitly defined in the task instructions and accurately reflect the expectations of the scoring scripts.
